Curriculum vitae

Hi!

Education:

  • Bachelor of Arts in Economics
    Mississippi State University, 2021
    Collegium Honorum, Summa Cum Laude
  • Associate of Arts in Economics
    Lone Star College, 2019
    High Honors, Summa Cum Laude

Interests & Personal

Outside of the CV version of myself, I am usually curious, overprepared, and pretending not to be nervous. In the classroom, that means I tend to be relatively informal, make a few dad jokes, and accept that at least one of them will make students cringe. I collect random facts about people, bodies, medicine, anthropology, and sociology, and I spend a suspicious amount of time organizing, troubleshooting, playing games, and tinkering with code. I am also a productive procrastinator: important tasks sometimes get delayed by less important but still useful ones. Since I deal with health issues too, a lot of what I do is held together by persistence, curiosity, and a willingness to keep going even when things are messier than they look on paper.

Skills:

Technical

  • R
  • HTML
  • Latex
  • Stata
  • Microsoft Office

Soft

  • Communication
  • Research
  • Data Analysis
  • Presentations
  • Lecturing
  • Undergrad Economics
  • Grad Economics

Life

  • Learning Random Facts
  • Sleeping
  • Wasting time making things pretty
